mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, created_at, updated_at FROM global_asset_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO global_asset_folders (id, user_id, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{name}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_characters WHERE folder_id = f.id) as charCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_locations WHERE folder_id = f.id) as locCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_voices WHERE folder_id = f.id) as voiceCount FROM global_asset_folders f WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
